steps.title: Focus on escape speed
steps.content: The claim says the energy cost of full speed can disfavor maximal speed "even in escape contexts." The supporting graph evidence must therefore show lizards escaping predators at less than their maximum speed.

steps.title: Keep the evidence on target
steps.content: Choice A compares escape with pursuit rather than proving reduced escape speed. Choice C emphasizes near-maximal escape speed, and Choice D is about pursuing prey instead of escaping predators. Data showing multiple species escape at under 90% of maximal speed directly supports the claim. The answer is B.
